fields.helpText: A code assigned to each facility identifying who is sending the record.  For facilities with a 7-digit FIN, enter the 7-digit facility- specific code in the range 6020009-6953290 that was assigned by the COC before January 1, 2001.  NOTE: 7-digit FIN codes consist of a constant "6" following a       6-digit facility-specific code (e.g. 6_020009 = 6020009).       Enter all 7 digits, including the "6" prefix.        For facilities with a 8-digit FIN greater than or equal to 10000000 that was assi
This is the full name of the facility.
City where the hospital is located.

Enter the 2 character state abbreviation. Denotes wheather or not an ACOS NUMBER is active or not. No data means the entry is active.
